---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Cortex
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work from a user's perspective.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the idea.
